title: Engineering Manager (Hotel)
description:
An exciting opportunity has arrived at The Garcha Group, Singapore’s boutique hotel group currently with the following hotels:

- Maxwell Reserve, Autograph Collection Hotel (Marriott);

- Duxton Reserve, Autograph Collection Hotel (Marriott);

- The Vagabond Club, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel (Marriott);

- The Serangoon Club, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel (Marriott).

Restaurants & Bars:

· Yellow Pot, Anouska's (Duxton Reserve)

· Shikar, Cultivate Cafe, Isabel Bar, Officers’ Mess Polo Bar (Maxwell Reserve)

· The Whiskey Library & Jazz Club, Sharab aur Kebab (The Vagabond Club)

· GupShup (The Serangoon House)

Garcha Group Benefits:

- As an associate of a Marriott hotel, you, your parents or parents-in-laws, children, spouse/domestic partner and siblings are eligible for discounts on F&B and room rates in 7,000+ hotels world-wide.

- As an associate of a Marriott hotel, you have access to the “Global Learning + Development” tool which creates for you personalized learning experiences designed to help you thrive in their Marriott career journey. (see attached for full Marriott benefits)

- 2 nights yearly staycation in any of the 4 Garcha Group hotels in Singapore.

- 20% off Food/Alcohol Bill at all Garcha Group restaurants and bars

Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

  • Review all facilities with an aesthetic eye for detail to ensure the property remains in excellent condition.
  • Be well-organized and hands-on in troubleshooting and resolving issues related to air conditioning systems (Daikin VRV), plumbing, humidity, electrical faults, and all M&E-related matters.
  • Support efforts to optimize system efficiency and reduce operating costs.
  • Ensure the hotel’s accommodations and facilities remain problem-free and in optimal working condition.
  • Manage the upkeep of buildings, equipment, and supplies in accordance with health and safety standards.
  • Plan, coordinate, and perform installations and repairs (telecommunications, HVAC, electrical, etc.) and refurbishment works.
  • Inspect building structures regularly and determine necessary repairs or improvements.
  • Assist in controlling activities related to waste disposal, building security, and general facility functions.
  • Coordinate daily engineering operations and assign tasks to technicians and facilities staff.
  • Prepare and monitor daily/weekly work schedules and follow up on task completion.
  • Conduct inspections and quality checks on completed maintenance work to ensure standards are met.
  • Communicate with Front Office and Housekeeping regarding room maintenance status and downtime.
  • Supervise foreign staff (handymen) and oversee external contractors to ensure quality and safety compliance.
  • Provide on-the-job training, guidance, and support to junior technicians and facility staff.
  • Promote a positive, solution-oriented, and disciplined work culture.
  • Oversee and track the preventive maintenance program for guestrooms, public areas, and back-of-house equipment.
  • Ensure all logs, checklists, and PMS documentation are completed accurately and on time.
  • Monitor recurring issues and recommend preventive measures.
  • Manage and track inventory of spare parts, tools, and consumables.
  • Ensure proper housekeeping, labeling, and organization in engineering storage areas.
  • Obtain and review comparative quotations for materials and contractor works.
  • Highlight stock shortages and coordinate replenishment requests.
  • Conduct regular safety briefings and toolbox talks for the engineering team.
  • Ensure compliance with PPE requirements, LOTO procedures, and safe work practices.
  • Participate in fire drills and assist with inspections and maintenance of fire safety systems.
  • Monitor key building systems (HVAC, pumps, boilers, electrical panels, BMS) and report abnormalities promptly.
  • Ensure contractor compliance with hotel safety rules, including hot work permits and barricading.
  • Escort and supervise vendors and contractors while onsite.
  • Ensure work performed by external parties meets standards and scope of work.
  • Verify and recommend contractor work completion before sign-off or payment.
  • Review utilities consumption and recommend measures to reduce costs.
  • Assist in managing insurance-related matters and maintaining service contract records.
  • Keep accurate financial and non-financial records, including maintenance trackers and reports.
  • Submit daily maintenance updates and escalate urgent issues to the Chief Engineer or Management as needed.
  • Maintain all engineering trackers and documentation.
  • Any other duties/tasks as requested by management.

postedCompany.description:
An exciting opportunity has arrived at The Garcha Group, Singapore’s boutique hotel group currently with the following hotels and restaurants:


- Maxwell Reserve, Autograph Collection Hotel (Marriott)

- Duxton Reserve, Autograph Collection Hotel (Marriott)

- The Vagabond Club, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel (Marriott)

- The Serangoon Club, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel (Marriott)

- Yellow Pot Tanjong Pagar (83 Duxton Road)

- Yellow Pot Little India (39 Syed Alwi Road)

- Anouska's Bar and Restaurant (83 Duxton Road)

- The Whiskey Library (39 Syed Alwi Road)

- Cook & Tras Cafe (2 Cook Street)

- Shikar (2 Cook Street)


Garcha Group Benefits:

  • As an associate of a Marriott hotel, you, your parents or parents-in-laws, children, spouse/domestic partner and siblings are eligible for discounts on F&B and room rates in 6900 hotels world-wide.
  • As an associate of a Marriott hotel, you have access to the “Global Learning + Development” tool which creates for you personalized learning experiences designed to help you thrive in their Marriott career journey. (see attached for full Marriott benefits)
  • Comprehensive Health Insurance Plan with Raffles Insurance with the option to upgrade at subsidized corporate rates.
  • 2 nights yearly staycation including all meals and beverage (incl. alcoholic) in any of the 4 Garcha Group hotels in Singapore.
  • Customized Uniform Allowance
  • 20% off Food & Beverage at all Marriott 
  • 50%-35% off Garcha Group restaurants and bars.
  • Night Shift allowance
  • Split Shift Allowance
  • Over-time
  • Paid Leave Entitlement 7-14 days (as applicable dependent on position)
